description: Installs and updates Chocolatey and Winget package managers.

messages.done: All package managers are installed and ready.
messages.notAdmin: This script must be run as Administrator.
messages.scriptDisabled: Package managers installation is disabled in config.
messages.completedWithWarnings: Completed with some warnings -- check output above.
messages.commandAll: Command: all -- Installing both package managers
messages.chocoDisabled: Chocolatey is disabled in config -- skipping
messages.wingetDisabled: Winget is disabled in config -- skipping
messages.wingetNotFoundSkip: Winget not found and installIfMissing is false -- skipping
messages.wingetNotInPath: Winget install completed but winget.exe not found in PATH
messages.wingetManualStore: Try installing manually from the Microsoft Store
